hero.headline: Easy Monthly Payments for Your
hero.subheadline: From as low as $89/mo. Apply in 60 seconds with no impact to your credit. Get your water heater fixed today, pay over time.

planHighlightsSection.label: Our Financing
planHighlightsSection.heading: Simple Financing, Honest Terms
planHighlightsSection.paragraph: We've made financing as simple as possible. Apply, get approved, get hot water — all in the same day.

plans.title: Low monthly payments

plans.desc: Apply in 60 seconds. Soft credit pull. Instant decision — get hot water today.

plans.title: No prepayment penalty

plans.title: Flexible terms
plans.desc: Terms tailored to your situation — short or long-term, we make it work.

faqs.q: What financing options do you offer?
faqs.a: We offer flexible monthly payment plans on qualifying water heater installations and replacements, with terms up to 60 months at competitive rates. We work with multiple lending partners to find the best fit for your budget.
Apply online in 60 seconds. We do a soft credit pull (no impact to your score) and you get an instant decision. If approved, you can sign electronically and we schedule your install.

faqs.q: Will applying affect my credit score?
faqs.a: No. Pre-approval is a soft credit pull that does not impact your credit score. Only when you accept and sign the loan agreement does a hard inquiry appear.

faqs.q: What's the minimum amount I can finance?
faqs.a: Financing is typically available for jobs $1,000 and up. For smaller repairs, we accept all major credit cards.
No. You can pay off your loan early at any time without penalty — actually saving on interest.

faqs.q: What if my credit isn't perfect?
faqs.a: We work with multiple lenders covering a wide range of credit profiles. Even if your credit isn't perfect, we likely have an option for you. Call us — we'll find the right fit.

finalCTA.headline: Ready to apply?
finalCTA.subheadline: 60 seconds, no credit impact, instant decision. Or call us — we'll help you over the phone.
